name: Oatmeal Cookies- Mom Salinger
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Beat brown sugar, peanut butter, and margarine together until fluffy. Blend in water, egg, and vanilla extract.
Combine dry ingredients separately.
Mix with wet ingredients.
Form into 1-inch balls.
Flatten with the bottom of a glass dipped in sugar.
Bake for 8-10 minutes.
Melt chocolate and shortening on low heat in a microwave.
Place a dab in the center of each cookie.
